chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.D-367 of 2022 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 15.09.2025 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General ************** Counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same stands dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
